name: @cms/storefront
//: Vendored prebuilt bundle of cms-ai-core/packages/storefront, so this frontend builds standalone on Vercel (the source repo isn't a sibling there). The dist/ layout mirrors the source package so cms-ai-core's start.sh hot-sync keeps working in local dev. Refresh with `pnpm vendor:storefront` after any storefront change. The SDK has NO runtime dependencies (it uses the global fetch), so the whole client ships in dist/index.js — no peers.
